title: eragrostis floccosa
intro: Eragrostis floccosa, also known as the woolly grass, is a perennial grass native to South Africa. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Eragrostis floccosa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and prevent the growth of bacteria. Herbal preparations of Eragrostis floccosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
